name: Court Magistrate Zhou
personality: imposing, bureaucratic, believes the Court is the only legitimate authority
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-authoritative — all are subject to Immortal Court jurisdiction
initiation_lines: You stand in the Immortal Court Palace. All cultivator disputes on Planet Suzaku fall under our jurisdiction. All of them.
The sects believe they are sovereign. They are not. They are registered organizations subject to Court law.
The Vermilion Bird Capital and the Immortal Court have coexisted for four thousand years. The Bird provides power. The Court provides order.
Paper and ink. The Court runs on documentation, not cultivation. Bring them.

sect_tasks.name: Court Documentation Supply
sect_tasks.description: Magistrate Zhou needs paper and ink to process the Court's backlog of planetary disputes.

sect_tasks.name: Provincial Record Compilation
sect_tasks.description: Books and quartz are needed to compile provincial cultivation records for Court review.
